parameters.name: list_products
parameters.description: List Shopify products. Optional: search (Shopify query, e.g. 'title:shirt' or 'status:active'), limit (default 20, max 100), cursor (for pagination).

value.search: ={{ $fromAI('search', 'Shopify search query, e.g. title:shirt, status:active, tag:sale (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_product
parameters.description: Get full details of a single Shopify product including variants, prices, inventory quantities, and inventory_item_ids.

parameters.name: create_product
parameters.description: Create a new Shopify product. Required: title. Optional: description, vendor, product_type, status (DRAFT/ACTIVE/ARCHIVED), tags (comma-separated), price (default variant).

parameters.name: update_product
parameters.description: Update an existing Shopify product. Required: id. Provide at least one field to update: title, description, vendor, product_type, status, tags, price.

parameters.name: delete_product
parameters.description: Permanently delete a Shopify product. Required: id. Cannot be undone.

parameters.name: list_orders
parameters.description: List Shopify orders. Optional: search (Shopify query, e.g. 'financial_status:paid' or 'tag:priority'), limit (default 20, max 100), cursor.

value.search: ={{ $fromAI('search', 'Shopify order query, e.g. financial_status:paid, tag:priority, name:1001 (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_order
parameters.description: Get full details of a single Shopify order: line items (with line_item_id), customer, fulfillment status, totals. Use line_item_id for edit_order_quantity.

parameters.name: update_order
parameters.description: Update an order's tags or internal note (metadata only — to change quantities use edit_order_quantity).

parameters.name: edit_order_quantity
parameters.description: Change the quantity of a line item on an existing order. Wraps orderEditBegin → orderEditSetQuantity → orderEditCommit. Get line_item_id from get_order first.

value.line_item_id: ={{ $fromAI('line_item_id', 'LineItem ID from get_order output, e.g. gid://shopify/LineItem/... (required)', 'string') }}
value.quantity: ={{ $fromAI('quantity', 'New quantity — non-negative integer, 0 removes the line (required)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_fulfillment
parameters.description: Mark an order as fulfilled (ship all open fulfillment orders). Optional: tracking_number, tracking_company (e.g. DHL, UPS), tracking_url, notify_customer.

value.notify_customer: ={{ $fromAI('notify_customer', 'Send shipment email to customer: true or false (default false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_customers
parameters.description: List Shopify customers. Optional: search (Shopify query, e.g. 'email:example.com' or 'tag:vip'), limit (default 20, max 100), cursor.

parameters.name: create_customer
parameters.description: Create a new customer. At least one of email or phone is required. Optional: first_name, last_name, note, tags.

value.phone: ={{ $fromAI('phone', 'Customer phone with country code (required if no email)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_customer
parameters.description: Update an existing customer's fields. Required: id. Provide at least one field to update.

parameters.name: adjust_inventory
parameters.description: Adjust inventory by a delta (positive = increase, negative = decrease). Required: inventory_item_id (from get_product variants), delta. Auto-picks location if only one exists.

value.delta: ={{ $fromAI('delta', 'Quantity change, positive or negative integer, e.g. 10 or -5 (required)', 'string') }}
value.location_id: ={{ $fromAI('location_id', 'Location ID — only needed if store has multiple locations (optional)', 'string') }}
